reviews.author: Prathibha Svn
reviews.body: I have been using it for years now.. the product was ultimate.. but last package I bought was something different... the texture and the color... it's totally different. I didn't get to feel it on my skin when I applied it.. I don't know whether they improved or something else. But I like the old one... I am not satisfied with this one.

reviews.author: Riddhima singh
reviews.body: According to price Less quantity container

reviews.author: SAMEENA ANSARI
reviews.body: This is my 3rd buy of Pigmentation cream. Its effect is very good and i can see feel my skin to be soft and supple and dark spots have reduced considerably. But I didn't receive any free gift as showing on website.
